support.summary: No irreplaceable CEO action required on active UOB RFI
support.detail: This $400k UOB S2P deal is in a healthy, procurement-led four-vendor RFI, with a 3-hour presentation on 25 Jun that went well and no blockers reported. The open gaps (no confirmed Economic Buyer, no champion) are standard rep/RSD motions Carl Kimball should run, not CEO-irreplaceable levers. There is no blocked discount, roadmap commitment, presales guarantee, or CEO-to-CEO peer relationship being requested.

buyer_target.name: Gillian Chua Kee Liang
buyer_target.title: Executive Director, Head of Strategic Sourcing and Procurement

support.why_not_vp: The recommended EB executive briefing and competitive positioning are pure field execution a CRO/SVP owns; no CEO-only veto or peer relationship is in play.

monitor.reason: Deal is active and moving (1 day since last activity, momentum 85.6, 25 Jun presentation went well with no blockers); no recent slip, slowdown, or competitor-edge signal to watch.
